MINI MINUTES: Nancy Dooley appearing for petitioner Helen Abbet. Trustee has discretion to invade principle. Court does not understanding why the Court should order the trustee to do it. On the Petition to invade principal and make gifts, Court wants better support for the request. Matter is continued to 4/16. Mr. Dougherty will notify Ms. Dooley. He will file a notice of non-opposition and he will not appear on 4/16.
